== Notes for [[Item:Q103289|Q103289]] ==

The residences of the Lerma Polanco branch were located in the street of La Calera. The [https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Casa_de_Miranda Casa de Miranda] and the [https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Museo_de_Burgos Museo of Burgos] are also located in the street of La Calera. https://www.fundacioncajacirculo.es/AHCB_D.php?cod=22383&nombre=Santa%20Cruz%20Polanco,%20Juan%20de

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-371226/search/0/Polanco

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-252543/search/0/Polanco

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/88668

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000076394909196

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
